title: chloraea bletioides
intro: Chloraea bletioides, also known as the New Zealand orchid, is a species of terrestrial orchid native to New Zealand. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, with the roots containing a compound called anthocyanin, which has been shown to have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Chloraea bletioides include its potential to reduce inflammation and improve cardiovascular health, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy. In herbal preparations, the roots of the plant are often used to make teas or tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
